title: Calibration Rollback Plan
description: Schema for a structured recalibration rollback plan. Documents the triggers, steps, and responsible parties for reverting a recalibration that degrades performance.

plan_id.description: Unique identifier for the rollback plan (e.g. RBK-2026-001).

version.description: The calibration version to roll back (e.g. v0.5.87).

triggered_by.description: List of rollback trigger IDs that activated this plan.

steps.description: Ordered list of rollback steps to execute.

step_number.description: Step order in the rollback procedure.

responsible.description: Who is responsible: human-reviewer, pipeline, or both.

detail.description: Detailed instructions for executing this step.

dry_lab_only.description: All rollback steps are dry-lab operations.

notes.description: Free-text notes about the rollback event.

dry_lab_only.description: This artifact is computational only and does not constitute biological proof.
